metadata.dc:title: 2025 Global Climate Data
metadata.dc:creator: Global Climate Data Team
metadata.dcterms:description: A small teaching dataset containing fictional annual climate summaries. Variables include average temperature, rainfall, and CO2 emissions for two fictional countries (Alandia and Borealia) from 2021 to 2023.
metadata.dc:subject: climate
temperature
rainfall
CO2 emissions
